  • Uses of User in model

    Methods in model that return User
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static User
    UserStorage.getOrCreateUser(String username)
    Retrieves the user with the given username.
    static User
    UserStorage.getUser(String username)
    Returns the user with the given username, or null if no such user exists.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Map<String,User>
    UserStorage.getAllUsers()
    Returns a map of all users.

    Method
    Description
    static void
    UserStorage.putUser(User user)
    Adds or replaces a user in storage and saves the updated user map.
